name: Poopsie
bio: The namesake. A bean bag and horseshoe ace who won the very first tournament, and a grandpa whose whole mission was making sure everyone was smiling. TODO(content): final bio + the story behind the name “Poopsie.”

name: Pat
bio: Poopsie's partner in everything — at the boards, in the stands at every grandkid's game, and behind every “GAS CARD!” Christmas gift.

name: Nick
bio: Grandson of Poopsie and Pat. Teamed up with Grandma Pat to win the emotional 2020 Cup — the first one after Grandpa passed, with a bald eagle overhead.
